description_en: The 63 m2 apartment is located directly on the Krems River and conveys a pleasant leisure atmosphere. The way to the city center along the river is comfortableÂ  and away fromÂ  traffic. The city centreÂ  and the universities and technical colleges can be reached on foot inÂ  15 to 20Â  minutes, by bike in 10 minutesÂ , and there are 2 CityBus stops in the immediate vicinity, which guarantee a quick transfer to the universities and universities of applied sciences. Since Krems is a small town, every destination can be reached by bike in a short time. The bright apartment is fully furnished, the fitted kitchenÂ  is equipped with a large 3-zone refrigerator,Â  dishwasher and various cooking and eating utensils. In the bathroom there is a bathtub as well as shower facilities and washing machine. Furthermore, the apartment has an anteroom and a walk-in wardrobe. The bedroom is equipped with a 160cm x200cmÂ  bed. The residential area has a very good infrastructure (bank, bakeries, coffee houses, supermarket, hairdresser, pharmacy, doctors........) and also offers many leisure and sports facilities. Use of the bicycle room and private parking space are included in the rent. Tel. 06603250874 or email susanne.kat@gmx.at

description_en: TOP 15 / HOUSE 12 FIRST LOCATION, NEW BUILDING, FIRST OCCUPANCY: STUDIO WITH LARGE TERRACE IN A PRIME LOCATION Are you looking for a high-quality condominium that can be occupied immediately and convinces with its central location in Krems? In the quiet MÃ¼hlbachgasse 12, in the middle of Krems' old town, you could find what you are looking for! ROOM LAYOUT For sale is the last available studio - a 1-room apartment on the 2nd floor, which offers 31.50 Â mÂ² of living space with its well thought-out floor plan and guarantees optimal comfort for one person. The room planning convinces with clear structures and functionality: The modern bathroom, equipped with a walk-in shower, a washbasin and a toilet, is easily accessible from the anteroom. OUTDOOR AREA The absolute highlight of this apartment is the generously sized terrace of 13.37 Â mÂ². During the warm months, it extends the living area into the outdoors and offers the perfect place to relax, enjoy and feel good. The (optional) installation of a pergola not only provides sun and rain protection, but also extra privacy, so that you can enjoy your outdoor space to the fullest. FURNISHINGS WITH FEEL-GOOD FACTOR The future owners can look forward to an exclusive interior design that offers the highest level of living comfort. Individually adjustable underfloor heating provides cosy warmth in winter and transforms into noiseless and draught-free natural cooling during the hot months of the year. In addition, electric outdoor shading enables a pleasantly cool living atmosphere even on hot days â and with low energy consumption. High-quality oak parquet in an oiled natural look gives the living rooms a noble ambience, while timeless porcelain stoneware and brand-name fittings underline the high quality standards in the bathrooms and toilets. The floor-level showers and the outdoor areas equipped with porcelain stoneware slabs complete the overall picture perfectly. Parquet Oak Natural Oiled Underfloor heating (individual control) Natural cooling during the high summer months Comfort bathroom with floor-level shower Branded Fittings and Sanitary Ceramics Porcelain stoneware tiling 60 Â x Â 60 Â cm Communal satellite system with multi-switch Fiber optic line to the home Electric outdoor shading MODERN ENERGY SYSTEMS - LOW OPERATING COSTS Modern building technology not only ensures a comfortable indoor climate, but also low operating costs â a decisive advantage in times of rising energy costs. The innovative heating and cooling system is based on high-efficiency heat pumps with deep boreholes, which significantly reduce energy consumption for hot water, heating and cooling. A photovoltaic system installed on the green roofs supplies environmentally friendly electricity and contributes to the supply of lighting, lifts and heat pumps. This forward-looking energy system for modern living reduces running costs and at the same time the ecological footprint. PARKING Parking spaces in the underground car park can be purchased and optionally equipped with a wallbox for electric vehicles. The sale of the garage spaces is commission-free directly from the developer, as are the apartments. YOUR EXCLUSIVE RETREAT IN KREMS' OLD TOWN This apartment combines an ideal room concept, future-proof energy system, exclusive furnishings and exceptional location. It is the perfect domicile for discerning residents who want to combine urban life with privacy and comfort. Unusually quiet inner-city location with no through traffic (dead end) Attractive living space concepts from studios to luxurious 4-room apartments Spacious open spaces such as terraces, balconies, loggias, gardens, green areas 2.65Â m room height, shading systems, wood-aluminium windows, floor-level showers, large glazing Green roofs, green areas and numerous plant troughs to improve the microclimate Innovative heating and cooling system with deep boreholes and heat pumps In-house photovoltaic system to reduce general energy requirements Bicycle and stroller room on the ground floor 98 garage spaces (optional) Completed at the end of 2024 PRIVILEGED LOCATION Living in the center is now a privilege and a new definition of luxury. Short distances to work, university or the supermarket mean more time for the finer things in life. You need it in Krems, too, because only one or two jumps away there is always a wide range of cultural offerings and with the Wachau, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, a unique region of relaxation and enjoyment is right on the doorstep. Whether cycling tours, hikes or culinary highlights with exquisite wines - here you can enjoy quality of life at the highest level. No wonder that Krems has been awarded several times as the city with the highest quality of life in Austria. All available apartment plans and further information are available for viewing on our project website â we look forward to your visit:Â WWW.1LAGE.AT

description_en: TOP 4 / HOUSE 12 FIRST LOCATION, NEW BUILDING, FIRST OCCUPANCY: APARTMENT WITH TERRACE AND GARDEN For many, having their own garden in the middle of the city centre remains an unattainable dream of living, as structural conditions and a lack of open spaces usually thwart this wish. At MÃ¼hlbachgasse 12, in the heart of Krems' old town, this dream has become reality â and is ready for occupancy. ROOM LAYOUT AND EXTERIOR AREAS The architects deserve a heartfelt thank you for the spatial planning of the 55.80 Â mÂ² 2-room apartment on the ground floor, because they have succeeded in realizing maximum living comfort and practicality in a compact area. The pleasantly sized living area of 23.84 Â mÂ² fuses living, cooking and dining at a high level. The bedroom has a walk-in wardrobe and â like the living room â access to the 18.48 Â mÂ² terrace. Your own private green space always remains in view, which, together with the terrace, creates a protected retreat in the middle of Krems' old town. The spacious bathroom is equipped with a walk-in shower and the toilet with sink is separate. CONSERVATORY GLAZING Both the living room and the bedroom are equipped with elegant conservatory glazing facing the terrace. This well thought-out solution allows plenty of daylight into the rooms, ensures a free, bright living ambience and creates an ideal connection between indoor and outdoor areas. Of course, the conservatory glazing is equipped with integrated sun protection, which ensures comfort and privacy. FURNISHINGS WITH FEEL-GOOD FACTOR The future owners can look forward to an exclusive interior design that offers the highest level of living comfort. Individually adjustable underfloor heating provides cosy warmth in winter and transforms into noiseless and draught-free natural cooling during the hot months of the year. In addition, electric outdoor shading enables a pleasantly cool living atmosphere even on hot days â and with low energy consumption. High-quality oak parquet in an oiled natural look gives the living rooms a noble ambience, while timeless porcelain stoneware and brand-name fittings underline the high quality standards in the bathrooms and toilets. The floor-level showers and the outdoor areas equipped with porcelain stoneware slabs complete the overall picture perfectly. Parquet Oak Natural Oiled Underfloor heating (individual control) Natural cooling during the high summer months Comfort bathroom with floor-level shower Branded Fittings and Sanitary Ceramics Porcelain stoneware tiling 60 Â x Â 60 Â cm Communal satellite system with multi-switch Fiber optic line to the home Electric outdoor shading MODERN ENERGY SYSTEMS - LOW OPERATING COSTS Modern building technology not only ensures a comfortable indoor climate, but also low operating costs â a decisive advantage in times of rising energy costs. The innovative heating and cooling system is based on high-efficiency heat pumps with deep boreholes, which significantly reduce energy consumption for hot water, heating and cooling. A photovoltaic system installed on the green roofs supplies environmentally friendly electricity and contributes to the supply of lighting, lifts and heat pumps. This forward-looking energy system for modern living reduces running costs and at the same time the ecological footprint. PARKING Parking spaces in the underground car park can be purchased and optionally equipped with a wallbox for electric vehicles. The sale of the garage spaces is commission-free directly from the developer, as are the apartments. YOUR EXCLUSIVE RETREAT IN KREMS' OLD TOWN This apartment combines an ideal room concept, future-proof energy system, exclusive furnishings and exceptional location. It is the perfect domicile for discerning residents who want to combine urban life with privacy and comfort. Unusually quiet inner-city location with no through traffic (dead end) Attractive living space concepts from studios to luxurious 4-room apartments Spacious open spaces such as terraces, balconies, loggias, gardens, green areas 2.65Â m room height, shading systems, wood-aluminium windows, floor-level showers, large glazing Green roofs, green areas and numerous plant troughs to improve the microclimate Innovative heating and cooling system with deep boreholes and heat pumps In-house photovoltaic system to reduce general energy requirements Bicycle and stroller room on the ground floor 98 garage spaces (optional) Completed at the end of 2024 PRIVILEGED LOCATION Living in the center is now a privilege and a new definition of luxury. Short distances to work, university or the supermarket mean more time for the finer things in life. You need it in Krems, too, because only one or two jumps away there is always a wide range of cultural offerings and with the Wachau, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, a unique region of relaxation and enjoyment is right on the doorstep. Whether cycling tours, hikes or culinary highlights with exquisite wines - here you can enjoy quality of life at the highest level. No wonder that Krems has been awarded several times as the city with the highest quality of life in Austria. All available apartment plans and further information are available for viewing on our project website â we look forward to your visit:Â WWW.1LAGE.AT

description_en: Ideal for students, teachers of the nearby universities. Suitable for individuals, couples and as a shared flat. Size: Â  72mÂ² plus 8mÂ² loggia 2 rooms, central front, fitted kitchen, bathtub, washing machine, separate toilet, loggia, cellar compartment (15mÂ²), car parking space Rooms: parquet floors, front and kitchen: linoleum, bathroom and toilet: tiles Krems and Stein can be reached very quickly via the Mauterner BrÃ¼cker.Â In one of the most beautiful residential areas of Mautern on the Danube is this very bright, quiet 2-room apartmentÂ with Â loggia Â on theÂ 1st floor Â without elevator in aÂ green quiet area. The apartment is in very good condition. Security door. Kitchen including fitted kitchen with new, energy-efficient Bosch built-in appliances, bathroom with bathtub,Â washing machine.
